title: Learning Support Executive (Admin Executive)
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

Eduquest International Institute is a Registered Training Provider accredited by SkillsFuture Singapore (SSG) to offer high-quality, industry-relevant skills-based training programmes leading to the Singapore Workforce Skills Qualifications (WSQ). We design and deliver quality training to support corporate clients and individuals seeking skills and competencies required for today’s and tomorrow’s jobs. Our programmes include WSQ-accredited courses and specially curated diploma programmes that enhance individual upgrading opportunities and boost organizational productivity.

Job Summary

We are seeking passionate candidates to sell and upsell skills development courses. You will coordinate course planning, build customer relationships, and work with the team to meet enrolment targets while ensuring excellent customer satisfaction.

Responsibilities

  • Coordinate with the planning division to structure course planners aligned with demand sensing and programme targets
  • Confirm classes at least 3 to 5 days before the course date, maintaining less than 10% class cancellations
  • Collaborate with team leads to execute activities that increase course registration inflow
  • Identify and build relationships with prospective customers to increase enrolment
  • Work closely with the sales and marketing team to implement initiatives such as cold calling, EDMs, mailers, flyer distribution, course previews, and roadshows to promote courses
  • Provide excellent customer service to trainees and visitors to create a welcoming environment
  • Respond promptly and accurately to telephone and other customer inquiries about Eduquest programmes
  • Ensure timely and accurate course registration by completing attendee details and collecting outstanding fees before course commencement
  • Achieve set enrolment targets under assigned programme groups
  • Maintain excellent customer satisfaction through effective communication and service
  • Perform other business development, sales, and administrative tasks as required

Required competencies and certifications

  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office, especially MS Word and MS Excel
  • Minimum two years of relevant working experience in clerical, administrative support, or related roles
  • Good command of English (oral and written) to communicate effectively with attendees
  • Ability to handle pressure and meet deadlines
  • Skill in prioritizing tasks and managing time efficiently
  • Attention to detail
  • Willing to work on either Saturday or Sunday (5 day work week)

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Educational level of at least Higher Secondary/Pre-U/A level/College in any field
  • Sales-driven mindset with good numerical skills
  • Strong written and verbal communication skills
  • Ability to work well in a team environment
  • Proficiency in Mandarin is an added advantage to liaise with Mandarin speaking candidates and handle Chinese classes.

Attractive salary and benefits awaits you!

postedCompany.description:
EDUQUEST seeks to attract highly motivated individuals that want to work as a team and share in the commitment, responsibility, risk taking and discipline required to achieve our vision.

At  Eduquest, we offer training programmes, both locally and globally, for a wide spectrum of capabilities, knowledge, and attitudes. These will help individuals to become more proficient and professional in carrying out the tasks assigned to them, and also enhance their employability skills. We capitalise on the knowledge, expertise and experiences of its professionals, consultants and practitioners from various industries, in order to offer quality and effective training programmes. Our training programmes are specially designed to benefit organisations and boost their productivity levels, a goal consistent with the Economic Strategies Committee of Singapore (ESC).

With strong commitment to training and development, Eduquest International Institute became an Approved Training Organisation under the Singapore Workforce Development Agency (WDA) in 2008 (Presently known as SkillsFuture Singapore - SSG), offering competency-based training programmes under the Singapore Workforce Skills Qualifications (WSQ). From December 2012 to May 2015, Eduquest was appointed by SSG (Previously known as WDA) as one of the Continuing Education & Training (CET) Centres for the Food & Beverage (F&B) industry. We specialise in delivering quality training programmes, conducting organisational and management assessments, as well as analysing training needs, while providing structured training programmes for individual learners as well as organisations.
postedCompany.name: EDUQUEST INTERNATIONAL INSTITUTE PTE. LTD.
